hook.summary: Hand unscrewing metal plates from a foot-shaped puzzle.
hook.visual_action: A hand uses a stylus to tap and remove screws from a metallic foot puzzle, causing plates to fall off.
hook.voiceover_transcript: I'm completely convinced by anyone who can unscrew all the screws on their feet.

scene_flow: Hand starts unscrewing the toes and heel of a foot-shaped metal puzzle.
The stylus moves to the middle section, removing larger plates.
The hand clears the remaining screws from the arch and side of the foot.
The final plates are removed, leaving the foot outline empty.
on_screen_text: Advertisement material promotional scenes need to appear after reaching certain levels or triggering the corresponding templates.
audience_proxy: Casual gamers who enjoy satisfying, ASMR-style puzzle mechanics and logic challenges.
